mapper.insert: insert into setmeal (name, category_id, price, image, description, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, status) values (#{name}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{image}, #{description}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{status})

insert into setmeal_dish (setmeal_id, dish_id, name, price, copies) values
(#{sd.setmealId}, #{sd.dishId}, #{sd.name}, #{sd.price}, #{sd.copies})
mapper.update:
update setmeal
name = #{name},
category_id = #{categoryId},
price = #{price},
status = #{status},
description = #{description},
status = #{status},
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from setmeal where id in
#{id}
